signals.title: Agent handoff summary
signals.content: A prior agent summarized that context quality failures are blocking reliable downstream reasoning.

signals.title: Current GitHub activity note
signals.content: A collected note says the reference implementation has current commits and package validation evidence.

signals.title: Older market context
signals.content: An older note describes retrieval market fragmentation but predates newer agent context tooling.

signals.title: Undated analyst clipping
signals.content: A clipped analyst note is relevant but does not include a visible date.

signals.title: Malformed social timestamp
signals.content: A collected social thread has malformed timestamp metadata.

signals.title: Future-dated pipeline note
signals.content: A pipeline note appears to be dated after retrieval time and should be treated cautiously.

signals.title: Failed tool output
signals.content: Timeout: upstream research tool did not return before deadline

signals.title: Low relevance personal note
signals.content: A loose personal note about writing style that does not materially help developer adoption analysis.

signals.title: Overscored handoff note
signals.content: A short handoff note has useful framing but its caller-provided score exceeds the accepted range.

signals.title: Underscored integration clue
signals.content: A useful note says downstream agents need structured decisions rather than raw retrieval snippets.

signals.title: Weak provenance scraped note
signals.content: A copied note mentions context judgment but its original source is unclear.

signals.title: Current implementation evidence
signals.content: A saved note says the package has a generic evaluate_context front door and batch validation harness.
